headline: Is Aptiv (APTV) Quietly Reframing Its Identity Around Non‑Auto Edge AI Platforms?
summary: Robust.AI recently selected Aptiv PLC’s AI and machine learning-based PULSE sensor fusion platform for its Gen 3 Carter collaborative mobile robot, pairing Aptiv’s radar-vision early fusion with Robust.AI’s vSLAM and perception stack to enable 360-degree sensing and safer navigation in complex environments. This integration highlights how Aptiv’s edge AI perception technology can extend beyond autos into industrial robotics, reinforcing its push into higher-value, software-rich...
